gxcr_aead_params_t Struct Reference
[Authentication and Encryption with Additional Data (AEAD) API (gxcr/aead.h)]

Parameters used to set up an AEAD context. More...


Data Fields

gxcr_token_info_t const * token_template
 Points to template for token.
gxcr_cipher_t cipher
 Cipher algorithm for encryption, value implies key length.
gxcr_digest_t digest
 Digest algorithm for ICV.
bool hmac_mode
 True if the data is to be encrypted, then hashed.

Detailed Description

Parameters used to set up an AEAD context.

These determine the exact operations to be performed on the packet, and the format of the internal context record. Once established by these parameters, the format of the context record cannot change.

Field Documentation

gxcr_token_info_t const* gxcr_aead_params_t::token_template

Points to template for token.

gxcr_cipher_t gxcr_aead_params_t::cipher

Cipher algorithm for encryption, value implies key length.

gxcr_digest_t gxcr_aead_params_t::digest

Digest algorithm for ICV.

bool gxcr_aead_params_t::hmac_mode

True if the data is to be encrypted, then hashed.

False if the data is to be hashed, then decrypted. Digest is HMAC mode.
